  "search_text": "lady in black uriah heep war peace melancholy dame she came to me one morning her long hair flowing in the midwinter wind i know not how she found me for in darkness i was walking and destruction lay around me from a fight i could not win ah ahah ahahah",

key_phrases: She came to me one morning, one lonely Sunday morning
Her long hair flowing in the midwinter wind

And destruction lay around me from a fight I could not win
